childhood.education: Dartmouth College; J.D. from Southern Methodist University.
childhood.earlyLife: Practiced law before founding Chief Oil & Gas in 1994; pioneered Texas Barnett Shale natural-gas drilling.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1994년 Chief Oil & Gas 창립 전 법률 실무; 텍사스 Barnett Shale 천연가스 시추 개척.

capitalOrigin.explanationKo: Chief Oil & Gas Barnett Shale 베팅 + Chesapeake Energy 매각.

careerTimeline.event: Founded Chief Oil & Gas; began Barnett Shale exploration.
careerTimeline.eventKo: Chief Oil & Gas 창립; Barnett Shale 탐사 시작.

careerTimeline.event: Sold portions of Chief Oil & Gas to Chesapeake Energy for $2.6B+; further sales over 2007-2011.
careerTimeline.eventKo: Chief Oil & Gas 일부를 Chesapeake Energy에 26억 달러+ 매각; 2007-2011 추가 매각.

careerTimeline.event: Continued operating Chief Oil & Gas in Marcellus Shale; major Texas philanthropist through Rees-Jones Foundation.
careerTimeline.eventKo: Marcellus Shale에서 Chief Oil & Gas 운영 계속; Rees-Jones Foundation 통한 주요 텍사스 자선가.

careerTimeline.event: Personal net worth at $6B per Forbes Real-Time. Continues Chief Oil & Gas operations + philanthropy.
careerTimeline.eventKo: 포브스 실시간 기준 개인 순자산 60억 달러. Chief Oil & Gas 운영 + 자선 계속.

moneyMechanics.primaryRevenueKo: Chief Oil & Gas 매각 대금 + 잔여 운영

personalTraits.knownFor: Founder of Chief Oil & Gas; Texas Barnett Shale natural-gas pioneer; major Dallas philanthropist.
personalTraits.knownForKo: Chief Oil & Gas 창립자; 텍사스 Barnett Shale 천연가스 개척자; 주요 댈러스 자선가.
personalTraits.philanthropy: Rees-Jones Foundation major Dallas-Fort Worth area patron of education, healthcare, religious institutions; signed The Giving Pledge.
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: Rees-Jones Foundation의 댈러스-포트워스 지역 교육·헬스케어·종교 기관 주요 후원자; Giving Pledge 서명.
personalTraits.controversies: Standard fracking and shale-gas environmental debates.

failures.description: COVID-19 collapsed natural gas prices; Chief Oil & Gas absorbed margin pressure.
failures.descriptionKo: COVID-19이 천연가스 가격 붕괴; Chief Oil & Gas가 마진 압박 흡수.

failures.description: Oil-gas-price crash compressed shale economics through 2015-2016.
failures.descriptionKo: 유가-가스 가격 폭락이 2015-2016 셰일 경제 압축.
failures.lesson: Shale operators exposed to commodity-cycle risk.
failures.lessonKo: 셰일 운영자가 원자재 사이클 리스크 노출.

quotes.text: Lawyers learn to read contracts. Oilmen learn to read rocks.
quotes.textKo: 변호사는 계약을 읽는 법을 배운다. 석유인은 바위를 읽는 법을 배운다.

sajuConnection.summary: Gap-Shin day pillar in Shin month — 'siksin-gyeok', creative output, fitting shale pioneer.
sajuConnection.summaryKo: 갑신 일주 + 신월 식신격은 셰일 개척자 정체성과 호응.
